execution_note: Codex-worktree isolation failed again on Windows (both Wave 1 agents hit 10-min timeouts fighting node_modules junction/ACL; neither committed; M3-PLAN.md was untracked so absent from worktrees). Pivoted to direct build in main worktree on ui-design, verifying pnpm lint/build/test per task, per AGENTS.md methodology + feedback_parallel_plan_verify_on_master. Task 1's agent edits were harvested (verified correct); Tasks 2-6 built directly. All Tier-1 gates green (lint + 52 vitest tests + build). Tier-2 owner browser gate still pending (manual).

6.title: Harness route + engine wiring + integration & Tier-2
6.error: Tier-2 owner browser gate still pending (manual).

completed_summaries.1: image_blobs v2 additive Dexie store (id, createdAt) + ImageBlobRow type; SyncOutboxRow.op gains 'upload'; SyncTable union gains 'images'. Harvested from the timed-out agent's edits, verified lint+build.
completed_summaries.2: Pure geometry (fitLongestEdge/planStepDown/thumbDims/decodeTarget), HEIC magic-byte isHeic + lazy heic2any transcode, processBitmap (EXIF-baked decode, decode cap, stepped-halving, JPEG q0.8 / PNG encode), and a Web Worker (Turbopack new Worker(new URL)) with main-thread fallback in host.processImage.
completed_summaries.3: ingestImage: in-flight dedupe (by File) -> processImage -> mint id -> atomic write of image_blobs + images row + outbox 'upload' marker; fail-closed on ImagePipelineError. evictOriginals: 72h + durability interlock (any pending/quarantined outbox row keeps the original). storage-paths.ts pure mainPath/thumbPath.
completed_summaries.4: flushImages runs before the LWW tables: load image_blobs (missing/no-main -> quarantine), upload main+thumb (upsert:true) then upsert the images row on id, clearDirty. Network error throws PushNetworkError (backoff); other errors quarantine that one image. Also relaxed image_blobs.main to Blob|null for pull-only devices.
completed_summaries.5: getThumbUrl/getThumbUrls: local-blob-first object URLs, signed-URL fallback (in-memory 24h cache, batch createSignedUrls) + fire-and-forget lazy backfill into image_blobs, handle {url, release()} with exactly-once revoke + LRU cap on live object URLs.
completed_summaries.6: /dev/image-pipeline harness (server guard 404s only on VERCEL_ENV=production, client island for pick->ingest->status->thumb + evict/clear-blobs buttons); evictOriginals wired into engine startSyncLoop + after each successful flush; extended mock Supabase with storage.upload/createSignedUrl(s)+getSession; 52 vitest tests green (geometry, HEIC, paths, upload happy/poison/network, eviction interlock, display cache/handle/LRU, in-flight dedupe, fail-closed; no M2 regression).
